variants: A resident of Roseglade Station, Yanagida Miyo was born in Briarshade Mill. She pursued her education at the Whisperwind Institute of Music, where she honed her musical talents. Yanagida now works at Quarry Lake Ventures, bringing her expertise to various creative projects. Her contributions to the music field have been recognized with the Radiant Eclipse Medallion, marking her as a notable figure in her profession.

Born in Briarshade Mill, Yanagida Miyo currently resides in Roseglade Station, where she continues her work as a musician. She graduated from the Whisperwind Institute of Music, a place that nurtured her passion and skills. Presently, she is employed by Quarry Lake Ventures, where she applies her musical knowledge in diverse ways. Among her accolades, she proudly holds the Radiant Eclipse Medallion, celebrating her significant impact on the arts.
